name: Harvey
description: Quantitative Polymarket Trading System — Kelly Criterion + LangGraph + CLOB

commands./harvey-backtest: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'integrations/polymarket'); from core.backtester import run_backtest, monte_carlo_simulation; print(monte_carlo_simulation(0.65, 8.0, 5.0, 600.0))"

safetyRules: NEVER set PAPER_MODE=false without explicit user confirmation
ALWAYS run backtest before live trading
ALWAYS check system_audit.sh before live start
